title: Variables should not be shadowed
description: Variable shadowing happens when a variable declared in a specific scope has the same name as a variable in an outer scope. This can lead to three main problems: Confusion: The same name can refer to different variables in different parts of the scope, making the code hard to read and understand. Unintended Behavior: You might accidentally use the wrong variable, leading to hard-to-detect bugs.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Variables should not be shadowed. Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.
